properties.name: casciian.ssh.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Casciian SSH server should start.

properties.name: casciian.ssh.host
properties.description: Network interface to bind the SSH listener on.

properties.name: casciian.ssh.username
properties.description: Single accepted username for the default password authenticator. Leave blank to disable the built-in authenticator and supply your own PasswordAuthenticator bean.

properties.name: casciian.ssh.password
properties.description: Password paired with casciian.ssh.username for the default authenticator. Leave blank to disable the built-in authenticator.

properties.name: casciian.ssh.host-key-path
properties.description: Filesystem path where the persistent SSH host key is generated and read. A leading '~' is expanded to the user home.

properties.name: casciian.ssh.banner
properties.description: Optional banner text sent during SSH user-auth.
